Find info, scroll to bottom, click 'record opt-out' link. May receive verification link.

Used by employers, insurers, law enforcement. Requires documentation. Very comprehensive profiles.
Property and mortgage data broker. Used by insurers and lenders.
Insurance industry data broker. Affects insurance pricing and pre-screening.
Freeze credit AND opt out of marketing. Separate from credit reporting opt-out.
Opt out of marketing lists. Separate from credit freeze.
Opt out of marketing and prescreened offers.
4th major credit bureau. Freeze credit and opt out of marketing.
Prevents approval of bank accounts in your name without consent.
Alternative credit reporting agency. Used for thin-file consumers.
Official industry site. Opt out of prescreened credit and insurance offers. Permanent opt-out requires mailed form.
Register all phone numbers. Takes up to 31 days to take effect.
Removes from prospective mailers. Does not cover political mail or recent business contacts.
Removes from direct mail vendors including charity solicitations and catalogs.
Cancel unwanted catalogs. Free service.
Remove address from coupon pack mailings. Free.
Free service to find and request deindexing of personal data from Google Search.
Remove doxxing info, non-consensual images, exploitative removal site content.

Real estate transaction data.
Survey and market research data. Known for robocalls.
